subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Praise be unto God that thou hast drunk from the chalice of divine knowledge and received thy portion from the showers of the mercy of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی الحمد لله از کاس عرفان آشامیدی و از امطار رحمت رحمن قسمت بردی چه که
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
